title: Implement Connection Note Templates in Outreach Agent
description: Develop a feature to use predefined connection note templates to optimize acceptance rates in the Contact Reacher skill.
business_req: Improve connection request acceptance rates by using personalized templates.
user_story: As a networker, I want to use connection note templates so that my connection requests are more likely to be accepted.
validation_notes: The ticket lacks acceptance criteria, related files, technical notes, and change references.

title: Create Detailed Documentation for Specialized Agents
description: Develop comprehensive documentation for each specialized agent to aid developers in understanding their roles and functionalities.
business_req: Provide clear and comprehensive documentation to support developers in maintaining and enhancing the system, ensuring they can quickly understand and modify agent functionalities.
user_story: As a developer, I want detailed documentation for each specialized agent so that I can easily understand their roles and functionalities, enabling me to maintain and enhance the system effectively.
acceptance_criteria: Documentation for each specialized agent is created and accessible in the repository.
Each agent's documentation includes purpose, key functionalities, and usage examples.
Documentation is reviewed and approved by at least one other developer.
Documentation is linked from the main README and QUICKSTART.md for easy access.
technical_notes: Ensure that the documentation is consistent with existing documentation style and format. Consider using markdown features like tables and code blocks to enhance readability. Pay attention to any recent changes in the agents' code that might not yet be reflected in the documentation.
validation_notes: The ticket lacks acceptance criteria, related files, technical notes, and change references.

title: Optimize BFS/DFS Traversal Strategy in Contact Discovery Agent
description: Refine the BFS/DFS traversal strategy to improve the efficiency of contact discovery.
business_req: Enhance the speed and accuracy of contact discovery to improve networking opportunities and user satisfaction.
user_story: As a networker, I want an optimized traversal strategy so that I can discover relevant contacts more efficiently and effectively, maximizing my networking potential.
acceptance_criteria: The BFS/DFS traversal strategy in the Contact Discovery Agent is optimized to reduce execution time by at least 20%.
The optimized traversal strategy maintains or improves the accuracy of contact discovery.
Unit tests cover the new traversal logic with at least 90% code coverage.
Performance benchmarks are documented, demonstrating the efficiency gains of the new strategy.
technical_notes: Consider using a hybrid BFS/DFS approach to balance between breadth and depth in contact discovery. Pay attention to the seed selection and depth tuning parameters, as they can significantly impact performance. Ensure that the changes do not introduce regressions in the existing functionality. Test with various network sizes to validate scalability.
validation_notes: The ticket is well-structured with specific acceptance criteria, plausible related files, actionable technical notes, and includes change references.
